2026-05-26T19:04:05.0013526Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0013609Z ```python
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0013831Z from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0014137Z from pydantic import BaseModel
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0014414Z from typing import Optional
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0014577Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0014670Z # Initialize FastAPI app
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0014903Z app = FastAPI(
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0015110Z     title="My FastAPI Server",
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0015508Z     description="A simple FastAPI server with CRUD operations.",
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0015893Z     version="1.0.0"
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0016109Z )
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0016213Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0016319Z # Pydantic model for Item
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0016562Z class Item(BaseModel):
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0016795Z     name: str
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0017008Z     price: float
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0017265Z     description: Optional[str] = None
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0017463Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0017667Z # In-memory storage (replace with database like SQLAlchemy or MongoDB)
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0018062Z items_db = {}
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0018274Z next_id = 1
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0018391Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0018476Z # Root endpoint
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0018690Z @app.get("/")
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0018898Z def read_root():
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0019178Z     return {"message": "Welcome to the FastAPI Server!"}
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0019425Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0019514Z # GET /items/{item_id}
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0019762Z @app.get("/items/{item_id}")
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0020024Z def get_item(item_id: int):
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0020301Z     if item_id not in items_db:
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0020657Z         raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Item not found")
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0021041Z     return items_db[item_id]
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0021207Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0021326Z # POST /items - Create new item
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0021597Z @app.post("/items")
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0021849Z def create_item(item: Item):
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0022098Z     global next_id
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0022329Z     item_id = next_id
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0022549Z     next_id += 1
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0022782Z     items_db[item_id] = item.dict()
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0023438Z     return {"id": item_id, "message": "Item created successfully"}
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0023730Z 
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0023829Z # Optional: List all items
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0024086Z @app.get("/items/all")
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0024314Z def list_all_items():
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0024547Z     return items_db
2026-05-26T19:04:05.0024749Z ```

2026-05-26T19:10:25.1592545Z     The torch.Tensor.cuda and torch.nn.Module.cuda are replaced with torch.Tensor.npu and torch.nn.Module.npu now..
